market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLV, XLE, XLF.

vol.note: Market vol calm (VIXY 20.6, 1th pct) — stops can tighten.

entries.plain: Take it now at market — fastest fill, but the worst price of the three. Price is already extended from value (medium chase).

Pin Bar — strong rejection of highs
